## Checklist

- [ ] I updated `extensions.json` with valid JSON (array under `extensions`).
- [ ] `slug` is unique (or I am updating an existing slug intentionally).
- [ ] `version` matches the ZIP at `download_url`.
- [ ] `download_url` is HTTPS and returns 200 without authentication (`curl -fIL` OK).
- [ ] `module_name` matches `module.json` inside the ZIP.
- [ ] `compatibility` reflects InvoiceShelf versions I tested.
